MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present, represented by Georgetta Lovett.
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lisa Cooper is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of February 26, 2018 is vacated.
